output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?actor WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P57 wd:Q65261 ; wdt:P161 ?actor .
}
GROUP BY ?actor
HAVING(COUNT(?film) > 2)
output.answer: John Travolta, Uma Thurman, Samuel L. Jackson, Brad Pitt, Harvey Keitel

```sparql
}

```
